news_items.headline: Jordan Walker walks-off Home Run Derby, Kyle Schwarber's bid falls short in front of hometown crowd & All-Star Game preview
news_items.summary: On this episode of Baseball Bar-B-Cast, Jake and Jordan give their live reactions to Jordan Walker winning the Home Run Derby, Bryce Harper and Kyle Schwarber coming up short in front of Phillies fans and preview the All-Star Game.

news_items.headline: Jordan Walker spoils Philly’s Kyle Schwarber party, rallies to win Home Run Derby
news_items.summary: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jordan Walker wore his Cardinals hat backward, chewed a big wad of bubble gum and wore the top of his jersey splayed open as he dug in for his final Home Run Derby swing.

news_items.headline: In Home Run Derby, Jordan Walker shushes Philly – and shuts out Kyle Schwarber
